程序包 edu.bupt.ta.service

类 UserService

java.lang.Object
edu.bupt.ta.service.UserService
public class UserService extends Object
Provides business-logic operations for user accounts and TA profiles. All data access is delegated to FileStorageUtil. This class does not perform any direct file I/O.

  • 构造器概要

    构造器

  • 构造器详细资料

    • UserService

      public UserService()

  • 方法详细资料

    • authenticate

      public User authenticate(String username, String password)
      Authenticates a user by username and password.
      参数:
      username - the login name
      password - the plain-text password
      返回:
      the authenticated User, or null if credentials are invalid

    • findByUsername

      public User findByUsername(String username)
      Looks up a user by username.
      参数:
      username - the login name
      返回:
      the User, or null if not found

    • findById

      public User findById(String userId)
      Looks up a user by their unique ID (e.g. "U001").
      参数:
      userId - the user ID
      返回:
      the User, or null if not found

    • getAllUsers

      public List<User> getAllUsers()
      Returns all users, with summaryStatus and cvStatus recalculated for each.
      返回:
      a list of all users

    • getAllTaUsers

      public List<User> getAllTaUsers()
      Returns all users whose role is TA.
      返回:
      a list of TA users

    • registerTa

      public User registerTa(String username, String password, String name, String email, int year, String major, String skills, String availability, String personalStatement, String relevantCourses, String projectExperience, String preferredRole)
      Registers a new TA account. The username must be unique (case-insensitive check). Assigns the next sequential user ID and sets the role to TA with ACTIVE status. CV-related fields are initialised to empty/MISSING.
      参数:
      username - login name (must be unique)
      password - plain-text password
      name - display name
      email - contact email
      year - academic year
      major - academic major
      skills - pipe-separated skill list (normalised)
      availability - free-text availability description
      personalStatement - candidate's motivation text
      relevantCourses - pipe-separated course list
      projectExperience - free-text project experience description
      preferredRole - pipe-separated preferred role list
      返回:
      the newly created User
      抛出:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the username already exists

    • updateProfile

      public User updateProfile(String userId, String name, String email, int year, String major, String skills, String availability, String personalStatement, String relevantCourses, String projectExperience, String preferredRole)
      Updates the editable profile fields for an existing user. Recalculates summaryStatus and cvStatus after the update.
      参数:
      userId - the ID of the user to update
      name - display name
      email - contact email
      year - academic year
      major - academic major
      skills - pipe-separated skill list
      availability - free-text availability
      personalStatement - motivation text
      relevantCourses - pipe-separated course list
      projectExperience - project experience text
      preferredRole - pipe-separated preferred role list
      返回:
      the updated User
      抛出:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the user is not found

    • updateCvMetadata

      public User updateCvMetadata(String userId, String storedName, String originalName, String contentType, String uploadedAt)
      Updates the five CV-related columns in a user's record after a successful file upload.
      参数:
      userId - the user ID
      storedName - the filename stored on disk (e.g. "U001.pdf")
      originalName - the original filename submitted by the user
      contentType - the MIME type of the file
      uploadedAt - the upload timestamp
      返回:
      the updated User
      抛出:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the user is not found

    • clearCvMetadata

      public User clearCvMetadata(String userId)
      Clears the CV metadata for a user, setting cvStatus to MISSING and all related columns to empty strings.
      参数:
      userId - the user ID
      返回:
      the updated User
      抛出:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the user is not found

    • registerUser

      public void registerUser(User user)
      Saves an externally-constructed User to the CSV. Normalises all text fields, assigns a new userId, and checks for duplicate username (case-insensitive).
      参数:
      user - the User to save (userId will be overwritten with the next sequential ID)
      抛出:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the username already exists

    • toggleUserStatus

      public void toggleUserStatus(String userId)
      Toggles a user's account status between ACTIVE and INACTIVE.
      参数:
      userId - the ID of the user to toggle

    • updatePassword

      public void updatePassword(String userId, String newPassword)
      Updates the password for a user.
      参数:
      userId - the ID of the user
      newPassword - the new plain-text password

    • saveUsersDirect

      public void saveUsersDirect(List<User> users)
      Directly persists a list of users to CSV, replacing all existing records. Used primarily by AdminService.
      参数:
      users - the complete user list to save

    • calculateSummaryStatus

      public String calculateSummaryStatus(User user)
      Calculates the completeness of a TA's profile. Scores the presence of 9 fields (name, email, year, major, skills, availability, personalStatement, relevantCourses, projectExperience) and returns: SUMMARY_COMPLETE if score ≥ 8, BASIC_COMPLETE if score ≥ 5, otherwise INCOMPLETE.
      参数:
      user - the User to evaluate (may be null)
      返回:
      one of SUMMARY_COMPLETE, BASIC_COMPLETE, or INCOMPLETE

    • hasUploadedCv

      public boolean hasUploadedCv(String userId)
      Checks whether the specified user has uploaded a CV, by userId lookup.
      参数:
      userId - the user ID
      返回:
      true if a CV file exists on disk and all CV metadata columns are populated

    • hasUploadedCv

      public boolean hasUploadedCv(User user)
      Checks whether the user has a CV file uploaded. The check verifies that cvStoredName and cvOriginalName are non-blank, cvStatus is not MISSING, and the file actually exists on disk.
      参数:
      user - the User to check (may be null)
      返回:
      true if all conditions are met

    • isApplicationReady

      public boolean isApplicationReady(User user)
      Determines whether a user is eligible to apply for jobs. A user is application-ready if their summaryStatus is SUMMARY_COMPLETE or they have uploaded a CV file.
      参数:
      user - the User to check (may be null)
      返回:
      true if the user meets the minimum requirements for applying
